# Awesome Fun Claude Skills

> A curated list of fun, entertaining, and joke Claude Code skills — personas, humor, and play.

Everyone curates productivity skills. This list curates the fun ones: skills that turn Claude into a samurai, a Kansai auntie, a gal, a butler — or just make you laugh.

Under construction. The list is generated from [`data/skills.yaml`](data/skills.yaml).
